content:
Dear Keepers,

We were blown away by how many of you stepped up to help with the first round of volunteer translations. Seeing so many people willing to spend their own time helping us make the game better is genuinely the best motivation we could ask for. We can’t thank you enough.
We’ve been receiving a steady stream of messages from more Keepers asking to join the translation project. Sorry to keep you waiting! As the project continues to grow and expand, we’re officially opening up a second round of applications.
亲爱的守密人，

大家好！
第一轮志愿者翻译招募中大家的积极参与让我们非常感动。
看到这么多守密人愿意慷慨地抽出自己的时间来帮助我们改进游戏，这真的是我们最大的动力。我们实在是感激不尽。

我们陆陆续续收到了许多守密人希望加入志愿翻译的消息。久等了！
由于项目正在不断发展，我们开启了第二轮申请。

**✦ The Important Stuff:**

**● Traditional Chinese繁體中文: **
We’ve added this to our recruitment list for this round! 
本次招募新增了繁體中文語系的在地化志工。我們收到了許多關於繁中翻譯品質的建議，非常感謝各位守密人願意伸出援手，協助我們進一步提升遊戲文本的在地化水準。

**● Already applied?** 
If you filled out the form during Round 1, you’re all set. We still have your info and you don’t need to submit a second one.
如果您在第一轮申请中填写过表格，那就没问题了。我们仍然保留着您的信息，您无需再次提交。

**● Timeline: **
We’re going through everything now and will reach out to selected volunteers by **March 13.**
我们会尽快审核所有申请，并将于**3月13日**前联系入选的志愿者。

**● Perks: **
As a small token of our thanks, volunteers get exclusive in-game avatar frames, a spot in the in-game credits.
为了表达我们的一点谢意，志愿者将获得专属的游戏内头像框，并在游戏内的创作者特别感谢名单(Special Credits Page) 中占有一席之地。

**✦ Sign-up Link:**
You can find the details and the form right here:
如您有兴趣加入，您可以在这里找到详细信息和申请表格：

[Volunteer Application Form](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeySqAR_beH4ldIxTz7egq2SaJTplTnJHdrPGBNz2I8yY68vQ/viewform?usp=dialog)

embeds.title: Help Localize Morimens! Volunteer Interest Form
embeds.description:
Dear Keeper, thank you for your interest in joining this volunteer project!
This short form helps us organize the volunteer translation effort. Your passion means the world to us.
~Ace

thread_title: Community Translators: Round 2 is Open! (繁體中文 added!) 本地化志愿者第二轮招募！
